name: Boomsticks - Shotgun Knockback
description: Gives shotguns a little extra punch

options.name: A Little Extra Punch
options.tooltip: A little extra knockback over vanilla. Upkick removed.

options.name: Blood Money
options.tooltip: More similar to Blood Money shotgun knockback

options.name: Arm Cannon
options.tooltip: About double the knockback of the Blood Money setting

options.name: Looney Tunes
options.tooltip: Cartoonishly huge knockback for shotguns. Extreme knockpack with some uplift. Pretty fun.
